caption: The video features an older man with white hair and a beard, wearing glasses and a dark jacket with a fur-lined collar. He is standing outdoors in front of a dense green hedge. The man appears to be speaking or narrating something, as his mouth moves and he seems engaged in conversation. His expression is calm and focused, suggesting he might be sharing information or telling a story. The setting is natural and serene, with the lush greenery providing a tranquil backdrop to the scene.
